General.Name: Dingyi Group Investment Ltd
General.Description: Dingyi Group Investment Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the loan financing and financial leasing businesses in Mainland China and Hong Kong. The company operates through four segments: Securities Trading Business, Loan Financing Business, Properties Development Business, and Food and Beverage Catering Service Business. It is also involved in securities trading and property development businesses. In addition, the company engages in the wine trading; restaurant operation and management; provision of food catering service; and other businesses. The company was formerly known as Chevalier Pacific Holdings Limited and changed its name to Dingyi Group Investment Limited in February 2012. Dingyi Group Investment Limited was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Convention Plaza-Office Tower, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
